vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual evidence. The pots are present, but the biological occupants are not visible or have suffered total systemic collapse.

inventory_reconciliation.P3_Pothos: Systemic Loss: No visible foliage; only the white rabbit anchor remains.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains only the white rabbit anchor; no plant matter detected.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Soil appears dark and potentially over-saturated or compacted across all units.
biome_observations.surface_debris: White fragments (likely eggshells or perlite) are present in the P3/P4 area.
biome_observations.desk_environment: Stable, no external biological contamination noted.

vision_report.temporal_deltas: Over the 5-day sequence, there has been zero vegetative progression. The state of the biome has remained static and devoid of visible plant life from the earliest image to the current.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total failure. There is no photosynthetic activity or structural plant integrity visible in any of the registered containers.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of white debris (eggshells) in the soil is a confirmed intervention, but it has not supported the growth of the registered specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image stack. My first step was to establish the spatial orientation of the pots and verify the presence of the scale anchor. Upon validation, I compared each frame chronologically. The findings are consistent: the biome is currently non-viable. The registered plants (P1-P4) are absent or have completely withered to the point of being indistinguishable from the soil. The environment is static, and the 'Systemic Loss' status is applied to all registered specimens.
